case_title: MANUEL CABRAL VS. JEFFERY LEN MCCURTAIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CABRAL, MANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCURTAIN, JEFFERY LEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,443.04 FILED BY CABRAL, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT MCCURTAIN, JEFFERY LEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
